title: 被誤認是華人　韓裔美軍遭嗆「滾出美國」

replies.msg:
美國加州一名韓裔男子周日開車時，遭一名中年白人女駕駛用種族歧視的語言開嗆，還一邊做出拉眼角的羞辱動作。

事發於舊金山東灣費利蒙市（Fremont），韓裔男James Ahn表示，他在Fremont大道開車時，一名中年白人女司機嫌他開得慢，不斷尾隨緊貼他的車，還打遠燈要他加快車速，但當時他的車速並未低於速限太多。

Ahn說，這名女駕駛之後切換車道超車按喇叭，更在他的車前緊急剎車，然後開罵要他「滾出美國」。Ahn的朋友拍下她罵人的影片放上臉書，當中可見女駕駛怒嗆：「這不是你他X的國家，這是我的國家，這裡不是中國。我的天啊，中國人好醜。醜陋的中國人。」期間還用手指比出拉眼角的侮辱華人動作。

Ahn表示，他其實是韓裔美國人，而且還是美國空軍後備軍人，覺得那名女司機可能以為亞裔都是中國人。事發後他向市警局報案，不過讓他失望的是，警員說此事件沒有造成身體傷害，所以無法起訴。（北美中心／綜合報導）

上mercury見到咁嘅comment
Of course we all pat ourselves on the back for reproving this lady's behavior. But once we've done that, we ought, in fairness, to ask what provoked it. The answer to that question is obvious, to those of us who live here with our eyes open, if not to Mercury News reporters and editors.

Over the past few years there has been a large influx of immigrants to the Bay Area from China, marginal english speakers. It is reported that large number of them are paying to be transported to Mexico and smuggled across the border to add to California's 5 million illegal immigrants and their burden on California housing, infrastructure and social services, and degrading the conditions of labor for all the rest of us, as well as inflating the already grotesque cost of living, particularly housing.

WHY isn't the Mercury News reporting on this? Because it represents the interests that profit from this criminal immigration? That's my guess.
